# Eshan Elahi

Eshan Elahi is a full stack MERN developer who builds React, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Python, and FastAPI products.

## Specialties
- Full stack web application development
- MERN stack development
- Backend API development
- Python and FastAPI services
- AI automation, AI agents, chatbots, and RAG-style workflows
- Business website development

## Main Projects
- SafarBot: AI-integrated travel booking platform with voice and text booking, bilingual Urdu and English interaction, Express.js backend, FastAPI AI service, and MongoDB
- Onyx Closings: business website focused on trust, clear messaging, and responsive frontend delivery
- ABDANIX Solutions Website: company website focused on service clarity, credibility, and modern responsive presentation

## Services
- React and MERN web app development
- Backend APIs and integrations
- AI automation and AI-powered workflows
- Business websites and digital platforms
